series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of documents, photographs, tapes or CD''s gathered or generated from a Division audit of a registrant, licensee or certificate holder for appraisers, appraisal management company, real estate or foreign real estate or home inspector. Information is confidential pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Sections 4735.05(D), 4763.03(D) or 4768.04(C).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copies are to be retained on-site for three years and then destroyed. ; Electronic: Photographs, tapes or CD''s are to be retained on-site for three years and then destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
